posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran's President Pezeshkian releases a statement just minutes after Iran sent Pakistani mediators its response to the US' proposal:

"We will never bow our heads before the enemy, and if talk of dialogue or negotiation arises, it does not mean surrender or retreat. Rather, the goal is to uphold the rights of the Iranian nation and to defend national interests with resolute strength," he says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
It really really bothers me and I view it as deeply unethical that we’ve all conceded that all of OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX are likely way overhyped and will come public at absurdly overvalued / indefensible valuations and hedge funds / VCs will just get to freely dump on bag holding retail, pensions and other forced index buyers.

It’s actually indefensible and disgusting imo. A lot of the blame lies with the index businesses that are changing the rules to facilitate this but also the media, bankers, HF/VC backers and their LPs, the companies themselves, and investors like us who don’t say anything. @Nasdaq
posts.author: hkuppy
